subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enamored of the Countenance of the All-Glorious, upon thee rest thy Lord's praise and His glory, His grace and His bounty, His generosity and His tender care [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق جمال ذوالجلال علیک ثناء ربک و بهائه و فضله و احسانه و جوده و عنایته
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual transformation, @education and the development of capacity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
